full_text:
Diao Xuan ŚąĀÁéĄ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Diao Xuan (ŚąĀÁéĄ). Guest of Sun Xiu, proposed Sun Liang arrest everyone at storehouse when mouse droppings were found in honey. Diao Xuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
